activation_chain.what: spine verify loop: real script + FBE route + */15 dispatch row
deploy STAGING allowlist + container-safe external-only buyer checks
Dockerfile COPY allowlist (third allowlist in deploy chain)

deploys: FBE Railway x3 (railway up from staging, receipts at ~/.sina/fbe-cloud-deploy-receipt-v1.json)

end_to_end_proof.first_real_run: buyer GREEN (live external HTTPS fetch of sourcea.app + www), recipe GREEN (25 recipes), both cycle_receipts writes ok:true

sustain_mechanism: CF cron */15 (sourcea-loop-specialist-tick-v1) -> FBE route -> real verify -> honest GREEN/RED rows; no manufactured green (L2)
lesson: FBE deploy chain has THREE allowlists: _STAGING_SCRIPT_FILES/_STAGING_DATA_FILES (deploy script), staging dir on disk, and cloud/Dockerfile.fbe-runner explicit COPY manifest (142 lines, no bulk copy). All three must carry a new file.
